(May 2015) (Learn how and when to remove this message) (Learn how and when to remove this message) HTML parsers are software for automated Hypertext Markup Language (HTML) parsing. They have two main purposes: HTML traversal: offer an interface for programmers to easily access and modify the "HTML string code". Canonical example: DOM parsers. HTML clean: to fix invalid HTML and to improve the layout and indent style of the resulting markup. Canonical example: HTML Tidy. CENTER) to valid ones (ex. DIV with style="text-align:center;"). References[edit] ^ "HTML Standard". html.spec.whatwg.org.
